title: Design Group Black Ribbed Design Freestanding Wall Mount Picture Photo Frame 4 x 6''
features: STYLISH ELEGANT DESIGN - Black colour contemporary ribbed design frame with protective glass front
PRESERVE YOUR TREASURED MEMORIES - Display your treasured photos and protect them from dust, moisture and also wear and tear through handling

VERSATILE AND FLEXIBLE - The orientation of these frames can be either landscape or portrait. Includes build-in wall mounting hanger or a versatile kickstand easel to allow you to display on desk or table top in your home and office
FITS FOR DIFFRENT OCCASIONS - Perfect gift for special occasion like Valentine's day, Birthday, Wedding, Anniversary, Christmas day. an be used for photographs, certificates and important documents
APPROX DIMENSIONS - Suitable for image Size: 4' ' x 6' ' (10 x 15cm) / Frame size is - 17.5 x 12.3cm (All Sizes are approximate)
description: This black colour ribbed style frame is ideal for displaying photos or pictures. The frame has a glass front to protect the contents, fits size 4" x 6" (100 x 150mm). Includes a clip for mounting on the wall, and a fold-out stand for displaying on a shelf or desk. Can be displayed in Landscape or Portrait orientation.
